name: Grave Detail
desc: Summons digger adds throughout the fight; every add death feeds Bursting.

name: Preserving Fume
desc: A party-wide damage-over-time cast that must be interrupted.

name: Pooling Sorrow
desc: Avoidable pools under characters; standing in them is avoidable damage.

name: Final Coronation
desc: A timed damage-spike phase with burn windows between.
